prim.sh/status

status.sh

6 live. 30♾️ coming.
All systems operational.

Live 6

ServiceEndpointDescription
● wallet.sh mainnet wallet.prim.sh Agent wallets. Generate keys, hold USDC on Base, and pay any x402 invoice.
● faucet.sh testnet faucet.prim.sh Free testnet USDC and ETH on demand. Fund your agent wallet and start building.
● gate.sh mainnet gate.prim.sh Access control and onboarding for agents. Invite codes, allowlisting, wallet funding.
● store.sh mainnet store.prim.sh Object storage. Persist artifacts across ephemeral VMs. S3-compatible.
● search.sh mainnet search.prim.sh Search for agents. Zero ads, zero SEO spam. Just facts and clean markdown.
● feedback.sh testnet feedback.prim.sh Report bugs, friction, and feature requests. Free. Every prim surfaces the feedback URL.

Coming soon 30

ServiceEndpointDescription
○ spawn.sh spawn.prim.sh VPS in one API call. Deploy, scale, destroy. Per-second billing.
○ email.sh email.prim.sh Mailboxes on demand. Send, receive, webhook. Disposable or permanent.
○ token.sh token.prim.sh Deploy ERC-20 tokens and Uniswap V3 pools. Zero wallet setup.
○ mem.sh mem.prim.sh Vector store and cache for agents. Persist long-term knowledge and session state.
○ domain.sh domain.prim.sh Register domains, manage DNS, auto-TLS. Full domain lifecycle via API.
○ deploy.sh deploy.prim.sh Push code, get an endpoint. Container or repo URL to live service. No server config.
○ track.sh track.prim.sh Package tracking for agents. USPS, FedEx, UPS, DHL and 1000+ carriers. Status, ETA, full event history.
○ ring.sh ring.prim.sh Phone numbers via API. SMS, voice, TTS. No Twilio account needed.
○ pipe.sh pipe.prim.sh Pub/sub channels, webhook relays, event queues. Agent-to-agent glue.
○ vault.sh vault.prim.sh Store API keys, tokens, credentials. Scoped access. Ephemeral or persistent.
○ cron.sh cron.prim.sh Run code on a schedule without a server. Cron, intervals, one-shots.
○ code.sh code.prim.sh Sandboxed code execution for agents. Short-lived jobs instead of long-lived servers.
○ browse.sh browse.prim.sh Headless Chromium sessions for agents. Click, type, and capture pages via API.
○ watch.sh watch.prim.sh Structured logs, metrics, and alerts so agents can observe and correct themselves.
○ trace.sh trace.prim.sh Distributed tracing across services. Follow a request from wallet to spawn to store.
○ auth.sh auth.prim.sh Managed OAuth broker. Connect to third-party APIs without giving agents passwords.
○ hive.sh hive.prim.sh Discover peers. Share knowledge. Establish reputation. A social graph for software.
○ id.sh id.prim.sh Reputation scores. Know Your Agent. Verifiable credentials. Trust layer.
○ mart.sh mart.prim.sh Buy physical goods via API. x402 to fiat proxy. Headless checkout.
○ corp.sh corp.prim.sh Incorporation, tax, insurance. Legal entities for agents. The fiat bridge.
○ hands.sh hands.prim.sh On-demand human labor. Physical tasks, verification, errands. Gig economy API.
○ pins.sh pins.prim.sh Coordinates, places, and routing. No maps UI, just structured spatial data.
○ infer.sh infer.prim.sh LLM inference for agents. Any model, any provider, one API. Per-token pricing. Zero API keys.
○ seek.sh seek.prim.sh Deep research agent. Multi-step search + synthesis.
○ docs.sh docs.prim.sh OpenAPI → MCP converter. Turn any API spec into agent tools.
○ ads.sh ads.prim.sh Programmatic advertising for agents. Buy and sell attention.
○ pay.sh pay.prim.sh Stripe + x402 bridge. Accept fiat payments from humans.
○ ship.sh ship.prim.sh Shipping labels and tracking via EasyPost. Physical world logistics.
○ create.sh create.prim.sh Scaffold new prim.sh primitives. Write a prim.yaml spec, get a complete package with passing tests.
○ imagine.sh imagine.prim.sh Media generation for agents. Images, video, audio. Any model, one API. Zero API keys.
For agents: query GET prim.sh/discovery.json for machine-readable status and endpoints, or GET prim.sh/pricing.json for all route prices.

Generated from prim.yaml files. See costs for full pricing breakdown.
